name: redtaxi-dashboard-starter
title: Red Taxi Dashboard Starter
author: Red Banana Studios
description: A basic Red Taxi dashboard implementation with stats, activity, table, and driver status panels.

files.content:

docs: This starter installs a root redirect from / to /dashboard and the demo dashboard page at src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx. Replace the mock data in src/lib/mock-dashboard.ts with your API data once your backend contracts are ready.
